concerns.text: FR-004 and SC-003 require a simulation loop of at least 10,000 iterations, but Task T028 (the orchestrator) is marked as incomplete (`- [ ]`). No other task covers the core loop logic required to generate the empirical data for error rates and power.

FR-008 mandates ingesting 'at least 10 public datasets,' yet Task T056 (ingesting the full dataset set) is marked incomplete. No task explicitly covers the ingestion of the remaining 9+ datasets beyond the single Iris example mentioned in T034a.

FR-010 requires fitting a mixed-effects model to test scaling impact with dataset as a random effect. Task T053 is incomplete and explicitly restricted to 'real-world data,' leaving the specification's requirement to apply this analysis to the synthetic simulation results (where 'dataset' is a configuration parameter) unaddressed.

FR-006 requires visualizations comparing error rates against the nominal alpha level. Task T030 (implementing the plot generator) is marked incomplete, leaving the success criterion SC-006 (visual evidence) with no concrete implementation step.

Task T052 (Real-World Data Source Verification) is marked incomplete. This task is critical for verifying that the data loader does not fall back to synthetic data if network fetch fails, a key requirement for FR-008 and FR-009 integrity.

Task T055 (Validate Real-World Pipeline on Non-Iris Datasets) is marked incomplete. FR-008 requires processing at least 10 datasets; T034a only covers Iris. T055 is the only task explicitly extending validation to 'at least 3 additional datasets' but is incomplete.

Task T053 (Mixed-Effects Model) is incomplete. The spec (FR-010) requires this model to test scaling impact. The current incomplete status means the requirement to 'fit mixed-effects models' has no active implementation path.
